Class SimpleCouchbaseClientFactory

java.lang.Object
org.springframework.data.couchbase.SimpleCouchbaseClientFactory
All Implemented Interfaces:
Closeable, AutoCloseable, CouchbaseClientFactory
public class SimpleCouchbaseClientFactory extends Object implements CouchbaseClientFactory
The default implementation of a CouchbaseClientFactory.
Author:
Michael Nitschinger, Michael Reiche

  • Method Details

    • withScope

      public CouchbaseClientFactory withScope(String scopeName)
      Description copied from interface: CouchbaseClientFactory
      Returns a new CouchbaseClientFactory set to the scope given as an argument.
      Specified by:
      withScope in interface CouchbaseClientFactory
      Parameters:
      scopeName - the name of the scope to use for all collection access.
      Returns:
      a new client factory, bound to the other scope.

      Description copied from interface: CouchbaseClientFactory
      Provides access to the managed SDK Cluster reference.

    • getCollection

      public com.couchbase.client.java.Collection getCollection(String collectionName)
      Description copied from interface: CouchbaseClientFactory
      Provides access to a collection (identified by its name) in managed SDK Scope reference.
      Specified by:
      getCollection in interface CouchbaseClientFactory
      Parameters:
      collectionName - the name of the collection. If null is passed in, the default collection is assumed.
